features: Rebuilt Dispatch/Admin Report Archive page using the generated code blueprint
Added KPI row for total reports, published, drafts, scheduled, photos included, and videos included
Added search for reports, clients, properties, guards, jobs, summaries, and report IDs
Added filters for client, property, guard, status, date range, and sort
Added report archive table with checkbox, report, client/property, patrol/job, date, status, included media, and actions

Added selected report detail rail with preview card, property photo, report ID, job details, guard, patrol type, date/time, duration, status, published by, template, summary, media counts, and actions
Added view full report, download report, share report, delete local report, archive CSV export, pagination, rows per page, and clear filters
Combines state.patrolReports, local Report Builder saved/published reports, and completed patrol requests as draft-ready archive rows
Preserved Report Builder Guard Name Fix from v3.0.62 and previous pages
